nl_query: Count the number of active relationships per relationship type.
failed_sql:
SELECT rt.relationship_type, COUNT(*) AS active_relationship_count
FROM relationship_type_config rt
WHERE rt.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY rt.relationship_type
ORDER BY active_relationship_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): relationship_type_config.active_relationship_count. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
